<USER_REQUEST>
function maskL8sr(image) {
  // Bit 0 - Fill
  // Bit 1 - Dilated Cloud
  // Bit 2 - Cirrus
  // Bit 3 - Cloud
  // Bit 4 - Cloud Shadow
  var qaMask = image.select('QA_PIXEL').bitwiseAnd(parseInt('11111', 2)).eq(0);
  var saturationMask = image.select('QA_RADSAT').eq(0);

  // Apply the scaling factors to the appropriate bands.
  var opticalBands = image.select('SR_B.').multiply(0.0000275).add(-0.2);
  var thermalBands = image.select('ST_B.*').multiply(0.00341802).add(149.0);

  // Replace the original bands with the scaled ones and apply the masks.
  return image.addBands(opticalBands, null, true)
      .addBands(thermalBands, null, true)
      .updateMask(qaMask)
      .updateMask(saturationMask);
}

// Map the function over one year of data.
var collection = ee.ImageCollection("LANDSAT/LC08/C02/T1_L2")
                     .filterDate('2013-01-01', '2015-12-31')
                     .map(maskL8sr)
                    .map(function(image) {
    return image.clip(roi);
  });

### 1. Summary of Our Last Conversation
In our previous conversation (**Developing GeoResilience Web Platform**), we architected a professional, dark-themed, two-page web platform for your geospatial consultancy (Sambus Geospatial and Acugeospatial). We brainstormed the site's structure—specifically focusing on highlighting your Volta Region flood vulnerability research—and mapped out an implementation plan. We also created the foundational HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files to establish the structural layout and dynamic elements of the platform.

***

### 2. Adding Land Surface Temperature (LST) and Downloads
Because you are using the **Landsat 8 Collection 2 Level-2** dataset (`LANDSAT/LC08/C02/T1_L2`), calculating Land Surface Temperature is straightforward. This specific dataset already provides a highly accurate, atmospherically corrected **Surface Temperature** band (`ST_B10`).

### 1. Summary of Our Last Conversation
In our previous conversation (**Developing GeoResilience Web Platform**), we architected a professional, dark-themed, two-page web platform for your geospatial consultancy (Sambus Geospatial and Acugeospatial). We focused on structuring the site to highlight your Volta Region flood vulnerability research. The deliverables included a markdown-formatted site structure, a timeline estimate for technical implementation, and setting up the foundational HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files to build out the "GeoResilience Hub."

***

### 2. Adding Land Surface Temperature (LST) and Downloads
For **Landsat 8 Collection 2 Level-2** data, calculating Land Surface Temperature (LST) is straightforward because the dataset already provides an atmospherically corrected Surface Temperature band (`ST_B10`).
